GameConditionDef.label: twisted Sun
GameConditionDef.description: A dark archotech has taken to filling the very skies with its twisted mechanites. All sunlight on the visual spectrum between 390nm-700nm should be avoided at all costs.

GameConditionDef.label: twisted Sun Approaching
GameConditionDef.description: A dark archotech has begun filling the skies with its twisted mechanites. In a matter of time, the very sun will become lethal.
GameConditionDef.letterText: A whining drone fills the air. Somewhere out there, a dark archotech plans to enact a horrid deed by gathering a large amount of twisted mechanites.\n\nNot long from now, twisted mechanites will fill the sky, and will be able to spread using ultraviolet light. Find roofed shelter as soon as possible.
